search_summary.notes: Justdial lists 35 opticians and IDBF lists 54 optical shops in Tenkasi. Justdial pages returned empty/403 due to JS-rendering and bot protection. Detailed scraping was rate-limited. The shops below were extracted from search snippets, schema.org structured data, known brand pages, and clinic websites. Some shops have partial address/phone info.

additional_context.justdial_total: 35 opticians listed on Justdial for Tenkasi
additional_context.idbf_total: 54 optical shops listed on tenkasi.idbf.in (including nearby areas within 100 km)
additional_context.gap: ~22+ additional shops exist on Justdial and IDBF but their details could not be extracted due to JS-rendering and API rate limits. Direct browsing of justdial.com/Tenkasi/Opticians is needed for the complete list.
